meaning: adj.爱奥尼亚的,爱奥尼亚人的,爱奥尼亚式的n.爱奥尼亚人,爱奥尼亚
examples: The Spot: Zakynthos in the Ionian Islands, Greece
Hundreds of thousands of ethnic Greeks were uprooted from Ionian coastal areas.
